extract: Counter has several referrals: For the move introduced in Generation I, see Counter (move) For the broader class of moves that can counter attacks, see Category:Counterattacks For the application for the Pokétch, see Pokétch → Counter For the moveset built with the defeat of a specific Pokémon in mind, see Metagame terminology → Counter For the technique used in Pokémon the Series, see Counter Shield For the game mechanic in Pokémon Pinball and Pokémon Pinball: Ruby & Sapphire, see Counter (Pinball)
